title: Quote / Estimate Gate
description: After intake qualify: gate before any custom price leaves the building. Checklist, branches, scripts. Chains from mf-tpl-004 ready-to-quote.

scope.after: mf-tpl-004 qualify complete or ready-to-quote branch
not_for: commodity price lists with zero judgment

mindset.principle: Quote is a decision, not a reflex. Gate first, number second.

mistakes.label: Quote old scope after client changed ask

steps.action: Run gate checklist from qualify fields
Pick quote_branch (send, hold, tier, rush, decline)
Log row + follow-up if no reply

gate_checklist.label: Deadline fits capacity or rush fee named

quote_types.label: Tier menu
quote_types.signal: Budget band unknown, standard packages fit

quote_types.label: Repeat client
quote_types.signal: Prior job on file, same specs

decision_branches.notes: Include valid-until and deposit if policy requires.

decision_branches.situation: Missing deliverable, qty, or proof reference
decision_branches.notes: No number. Back to mf-tpl-004 clarify templates.

decision_branches.situation: Scope fits package A/B/C, budget unknown
decision_branches.notes: Let them pick tier; custom only after selection.

decision_branches.situation: Deadline tight but doable with fee
decision_branches.notes: Rush fee as line item, not buried.

decision_branches.situation: Wrong fit, margin bad, or cannot hit date
Repeat client, same job as prior order
decision_branches.notes: Confirm nothing changed; still send terms.

decision_branches.situation: Client added pages, colors, or locations since qualify
decision_branches.notes: Void prior quote id. See mf-tool-003 if mid-job.

decision_branches.situation: Anger or past failure on thread

quote_fields.why: What they pay for, each named

automation_hooks.mf-tool-003: Mid-job scope change after quote accepted
automation_hooks.mf-tpl-005: Weekly ops: quotes out with no reply
automation_hooks.mf-tool-001: Before buying quoting SaaS, run automate rubric

agent_signal.use_when: Scope is clear enough to price: custom quote or estimate gate before send.
decision_criteria: No blind pricing on fab/install without qty and deliverable.
Deposit terms stated on same send as quote.
agent_signal.operator_context: Treasure Valley GCs often need COI and permit notes on quote; flag install add-ons early.
